title: dracaena fernaldii
intro: Dracaena fernaldii, also known as the Dragon Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of China and is valued for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat wounds and reduce pain. The plant is also known for its health benefits, including its ability to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory health. The herbal preparations of Dracaena fernaldii include extracts and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, capsules, and other medicinal products.
